products.name: Parmesan Bread Bites
products.description: Handmade from fresh buttery tasting pan dough, drizzled with garlic seasoning and sprinkled with Parmesan. Oven baked to perfection. Add marinara or your favorite dipping cup for an additional charge.

products.name: Garlic Bread Bites
products.description: Handmade from fresh buttery tasting pan dough, drizzled with garlic seasoning. Oven baked to perfection. Add marinara or your favorite dipping cup for an additional charge.

products.name: Stuffed Cheesy Bread
products.description: Our oven-baked breadsticks are stuffed and covered in a blend of cheese made with 100% real mozzarella and cheddar. Seasoned with a touch of garlic and Parmesan. Add marinara or your favorite dipping cup for an additional charge.

products.name: Pepperoni Stuffed Cheesy Bread
products.description: Our oven-baked breadsticks are stuffed with cheese and pepperoni - covered in a blend of cheese made with 100% real mozzarella and cheddar. Seasoned with a touch of garlic and Parmesan. Add marinara or your favorite dipping cup for an additional charge.

products.name: Spinach & Feta Stuffed Cheesy Bread
products.description: Our oven-baked breadsticks are stuffed with cheese, fresh spinach and Feta cheese - covered in a blend of cheese made with 100% real mozzarella and cheddar. Seasoned with a touch of garlic and Parmesan. Add marinara or your favorite dipping cup for an additional charge.

products.name: Bacon & Jalapeno Stuffed Cheesy Bread
products.description: Our oven-baked breadsticks are stuffed with cheese, smoked bacon and jalapeno peppers - covered in a blend of cheese made with 100% real mozzarella and cheddar. Seasoned with a touch of garlic and Parmesan. Add marinara or your favorite dipping cup for an additional charge.

products.name: Cinnamon Bread Bites
products.description: Handmade from fresh buttery tasting pan dough, drizzled with cinnamon and sugar. Oven baked to perfection. Served with a side of sweet icing for dipping or drizzling.

products.name: Domino's Marbled Cookie Brownie
products.description: Taste the decadent blend of gooey oven-baked cookie with chocolatey chunks and delicious fudge brownie. Oven-baked to perfection and cut into 9 pieces - this dessert is perfect to share with the whole group.

products.name: Chocolate Lava Crunch Cakes
products.description: Indulge in three delectable oven-baked chocolate cakes with molten chocolate fudge on the inside. Perfectly topped with a dash of powdered sugar.

products.name: Coke®
products.description: The authentic cola sensation that is a refreshing part of sharing life's enjoyable moments.

products.name: Diet Coke®
products.description: Beautifully balanced adult cola taste in a no calorie beverage.

products.name: Fanta® Orange
products.description: Exuberant tropical fun to release you from the everyday mundane.

products.name: Sprite®
products.description: Unique Lymon (lemon-lime) flavor, clear, clean and crisp with no caffeine.

products.name: Dasani® Bottle Water
products.description: Fresh, crisp tasting water.

products.name: Lemonade Bottle
products.description: Made with the goodness of real lemons, Minute Maid® Lemonade is the quintessential refreshing beverage with the great taste of a simpler time.

products.name: Classic Garden
products.description: A crisp and colorful combination of grape tomatoes, red onion, carrots, red cabbage, cheddar cheese and seasoned croutons, all atop a blend of romaine and iceberg lettuce.

products.name: Chicken Caesar
products.description: The makings of a classic: grilled white meat chicken, Parmesan cheese and seasoned croutons, all atop a blend of romaine and iceberg lettuce.

products.name: 5-Cheese Mac & Cheese
products.description: Our take on the classic. Penne pasta and a blend of cheese made with 100% real mozzarella, cheddar, American, Parmesan, Asiago and Alfredo sauce, oven baked to creamy, bubbly perfection.

products.name: Spicy Buffalo 5-Cheese Mac & Cheese
products.description: Our creamy, oven-baked 5 Cheese Mac & Cheese drizzled with buffalo sauce for a spicy kick.

products.name: Chicken Alfredo
products.description: Try our savory Chicken Alfredo Pasta. Grilled chicken breast and creamy Alfredo sauce is mixed with penne pasta and baked to creamy perfection.

products.name: The People's Pizza - Deluxe
products.description:
Savory pepperoni and Italian sausage, fresh green peppers, fresh mushrooms, fresh onions, provolone and cheese made with 100% real mozzarella. 

We’ve combined our customers’ most ordered toppings into the perfect deluxe pizza.

products.name: ExtravaganZZa
products.description: Pepperoni, ham, Italian sausage, beef, fresh onions, fresh green peppers, fresh mushrooms and black olives, all sandwiched between two layers of provolone and cheese made with 100% real mozzarella.

products.name: Pizza
products.description: A custom pizza made to order. Choose from any of our delicious crust styles, including Handmade Pan.

products.name: MeatZZa
products.description: Pepperoni, ham, Italian sausage and beef, all sandwiched between two layers of provolone and cheese made with 100% real mozzarella.

products.name: Ultimate Pepperoni
products.description: Two layers of pepperoni sandwiched between provolone, Parmesan-Asiago and cheese made with 100% real mozzarella then sprinkled with oregano.

products.name: Memphis BBQ Chicken
products.description: Grilled chicken breast, honey BBQ sauce, fresh onions, cheddar, provolone and cheese made with 100% real mozzarella

products.name: Wisconsin 6-Cheese
products.description: Feta, provolone, cheddar, Parmesan-Asiago, cheese made with 100% real mozzarella and sprinkled with oregano.

products.name: Philly Cheese Steak
products.description: Tender slices of steak, fresh onions, fresh green peppers, fresh mushrooms, provolone and American cheese.

products.name: Pacific Veggie
products.description: Fresh baby spinach, fresh onions, fresh mushrooms, tomatoes, black olives, feta, provolone, cheese made with 100% real mozzarella and sprinkled with a garlic herb seasoning.

products.name: Spinach & Feta
products.description: Creamy Alfredo sauce, fresh spinach, fresh onions, feta, Parmesan-Asiago, provolone and cheese made with 100% real mozzarella.

products.name: Honolulu Hawaiian
products.description: Sliced ham, smoked bacon, pineapple, fresh green peppers, provolone and cheese made with 100% real mozzarella.

products.name: Spicy Chicken Bacon Ranch
products.description: Grilled chicken breast, creamy ranch, smoked bacon, jalapeños, provolone, and cheese made with 100% real mozzarella and finished off with a drizzle of buffalo sauce.

products.name: Philly Cheese Steak
products.description: Deliciously tender slices of steak, American and provolone cheeses, fresh onions, fresh green peppers and fresh mushrooms.

products.name: Chicken Bacon Ranch
products.description: Grilled chicken breast topped with smoked bacon, creamy ranch and provolone cheese.

products.name: Italian
products.description: Pepperoni and ham topped with banana peppers, fresh green peppers, fresh onions, and provolone cheese.

products.name: Chicken Parm
products.description: Grilled chicken breast, tomato basil marinara, Parmesan-Asiago and provolone cheese.

products.name: Buffalo Chicken
products.description: Grilled chicken breast, ranch, fresh onions, hot buffalo sauce, provolone, cheddar and cheese made with 100% real mozzarella.​​​

products.name: Chicken Habanero
products.description: Grilled chicken breast, pineapple, jalapenos, sweet mango habanero sauce, provolone, cheddar and cheese made with 100% real mozzarella.

products.name: Red Pepper Seasoning Flakes
products.description: Crushed red pepper adds a spicy kick to pizzas and pastas.

products.name: Philly Cheese Steak Loaded Tots
products.description: Golden brown potato tots topped with tender slices of steak, creamy Alfredo sauce, fresh onions, fresh green peppers, and a blend of cheese made with mozzarella and cheddar.

products.name: Melty 3-Cheese Loaded Tots

products.name: Loaded Chicken – Crispy Bacon & Tomato
products.description: Tender bites of breaded chicken made with 100% whole breast white meat topped with garlic Parmesan sauce, a blend of cheese made with mozzarella and cheddar, crispy bacon and tomato.

products.description: Tender bites of breaded chicken made with 100% whole breast white meat topped with hot buffalo sauce, ranch, a blend of cheese made with mozzarella and cheddar, and feta.
